scroller_feed: CRITICAL: NEW YORK, USA TARGETED FOR SUPPLY CHAIN BREAK | GLOBAL TRADE VOLUMES HAVE DECREASED BY 2.1% IN THE PAST QUARTER, WHILE THE GLOBAL DEBT-TO-GDP RATIO HAS INCREASED TO 253%. ECONOMIC INSTABILITY IS RISING IN EASTERN EUROPE DUE TO REGIONAL CONFLICTS.
